translation.game_desc_1: Test your reflexes and whack the moles as they appear!
translation.game_desc_2: The timeless classic, eat to grow and avoid the walls.
translation.game_desc_3: Challenge your friends to this strategic duel.
translation.game_desc_4: Navigate the maze and reach the goal.
translation.game_desc_5: Speed and reflexes on the table.
translation.game_desc_6: Clear the board without detonating any hidden mines.
translation.game_desc_7: Blast the candies in this addictive puzzle!
translation.game_desc_10: Slide tiles and merge them together to reach the 2048 tile.
translation.game_desc_12: Navigate the bird through the pipes without hitting them.
translation.game_desc_14: Slice and dice juicy fruits like a true ninja!
translation.game_desc_16: Chomp dots and avoid ghosts in this arcade classic.
translation.game_desc_17: Outsmart your opponent in the ultimate game of strategy.
translation.game_desc_18: Clear lines with falling blocks in this classic puzzle game.
translation.game_desc_19: Outmaneuver your opponent and king your pieces in this classic strategy board game.
translation.game_desc_20: Infiltrate EVILCORP and defeat your enemies as a ninja.
translation.game_desc_21: A mesmerizing audio-visual experience combining generative graphics with sound.
